# Flux

> Flux is a minimalist, gamified PWA productivity dashboard — a "digital nervous system" that visualizes daily execution consistency, adapts to the calendar month, and rewards discipline.

Flux helps you track daily objectives, build streaks, run focus timers, and watch your consistency light up across a dynamic monthly calendar. It is offline-first, installable to your home screen, and built around a calm lavender aesthetic.

## Pages

- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to access your personal Flux dashboard.

## Optional

- [Home](/): The personal dashboard with the monthly calendar, daily tasks, focus timer, and analytics (requires sign-in).
